Excellent coverage with property-based tests for clamping/distance invariants and rarity distribution. Several unit tests lack diagnostic messages.
Exceptional test file with thorough boundary testing (1.5x ratio, tier thresholds), well-documented behavioral contracts, complete profile field coverage.
Strong element-color mapping, dominant-element tint logic, and shader variant selection. Missing intermediate rarity shader tests.

crates/card_game/tests/suite/card_intera.summary: Good camera drag and zoom coverage but uses fragile exact float comparisons and minimal diagnostics.
Solid click resolution tests including double-pick regression test. Missing tiebreaker and multiple-socket overlap scenarios.
Comprehensive damping system tests with strong zone-filtering coverage (Table/Hand/Reader) and monotonicity verification.
Outstanding drag physics tests with rigorous rigid-body constraint verification, arm-length boundary tests, and velocity clamping checks.
Thorough flip trigger tests covering card/zone filtering, overlap resolution, and animation non-restart behavior.

findings.detail: Null-path test banned by project conventions: tests empty-entity system doesn't panic
findings.suggestion: Remove this test. Empty-entity coverage already provided by other tests in the file.

crates/card_game/tests/suite/card_intera.summary: Excellent animation lifecycle coverage (shrink, midpoint swap, grow, completion). Marred by one banned null-path test.
Top-tier test file with thorough zone transition coverage, inline sleep/wake regression guards, and well-documented behavioral contracts.
Solid click-pick tests covering hit-testing, sort-order resolution, rotated OBB, and stash interaction.
Well-structured release tests using builder pattern, good zone priority coverage (stash > hand > table) and edge case handling.
Focused, well-documented sleep system tests covering all relevant states with good zone filtering and no-body edge case.

crates/card_game/tests/suite/card_jack_c.summary: Thorough wrap/unwrap detection and propagation with excellent boundary coverage (grazing edges, multi-obstacle, bug regressions). Some weak assertions without custom messages.

crates/card_game/tests/suite/card_jack_s.summary: Excellent socket lifecycle coverage: render, pick (happy+3 guards), drag preview, release (8 scenarios), disconnect-drag (3 scenarios).

crates/card_game/tests/suite/card_reader.summary: Very thorough (28 tests): click, release, AABB overlap, rotation lock, insert, miss, full-guard, drag, eject, overlapping readers. Contains one null-path test.
Covers glow lifecycle (runs dim, runes lit when loaded, accent/recess lit, return-to-dim on eject). No edge cases. Structure repetitive.
Happy-path only: root shape, child counts, ChildOf pointers. No error/edge cases. All assert_eq! lack custom messages. Tests structure (exactly 6 children) rather than behavior.
Solid pure-math tests for sphere/tube volume, Newton solver, polyline arc length. Some hardcoded magic numbers not tied to source constants.

crates/card_game/tests/suite/card_render.summary: Covers all rarity-to-shader mappings, WGSL parsing for 5+ shaders, binding validation. Some string.contains() checks fragile.
Tests front/back mesh generation, gem geometry, art region exclusion. bake_back_then_mesh_has_vertices uses minimal !mesh.is_empty() assertion.
Three tests for F9 toggle overlay. Toggle-off assertion fragile. when_debug_key_not_pressed is null-path test.
Tests Digit1/2/3 key spawn counts (1, 10, 100), no-key. Seeded RNG. Simple count assertions lack custom messages.
Three tests: active drag shows glow, no drag no glow, zero viewport no crash. Narrow scope, when_no_drag is null-path test.
Tests GPU mesh upload, face-up/down selection, item form removal, sync adding missing mesh. Good helper usage reducing boilerplate.
Four focused tests: parent-child layer sync (UI, World, dynamic change) and non-face child independence. All assert_eq! lack messages.
Very thorough (25+ tests): face-down/up, label, meshes, collider, overlays, UV correctness, fallback, residual stats. Some signature values hash-dependent.

crates/card_game/tests/suite/card_screen.summary: Top-tier: axis extraction, signal vs no-signal draws, full cable propagation integration, multi-point capsule geometry, clipping boundaries, spline density. Clear @doc annotations.

crates/card_game/tests/suite/card_zone_c.summary: Three focused tests covering Hand, Table, and Stash zone config properties. Clean AAA pattern, only nominal variants tested.

crates/card_game/tests/suite/hand_cards..summary: Ten tests covering Hand add/remove/is_full/hand_cards with good boundary coverage (full hand, unknown removal, order preservation).

crates/card_game/tests/suite/hand_layout.summary: Extensive fan layout math, screen positions, spring physics, camera zoom, scale convergence. Strong diagnostics with expected vs actual values.

Comprehensive visual regression testing: SSIM comparison, row padding, HeadlessRenderer lifecycle, golden image save/load/error. GPU-dependent tests use early-return skip.

findings.detail: Only 3 tests covering happy paths. No tests for empty state, re-binding same texture, duplicate slots, unordered bindings
findings.suggestion: Add tests for empty PendingMaterialBindings, duplicate/overwrite bindings, and pack with missing texture IDs

crates/engine_render/tests/suite/wgpu_re.summary: Small but focused material binding tests. Only 3 happy-path tests with no edge cases or AAA comments.

crates/engine_scene/tests/suite/hierarch.summary: Excellent hierarchy maintenance: single/multiple children, parent independence, sorting, idempotent reruns, despawn, reparenting, Changed detection, proptest.

findings.detail: Module declaration file, not a test file. Contains only mod statements.
findings.suggestion: No action needed â€” this is test infrastructure, not a test.

crates/engine_scene/tests/suite/mod.rs.summary: Module declaration file â€” no test functions.

findings.detail: 2 of 5 tests are serde roundtrip tests on derived Serialize/Deserialize (banned by project policy)
findings.suggestion: Remove derived serde roundtrip tests

findings.detail: No tests for SortOrder wrapping, min/max edge values, sort stability with ties
findings.suggestion: Add tests for SortOrder(i32::MIN/MAX), tie-breaking determinism

crates/engine_scene/tests/suite/render_o.summary: Simple ordering tests pass but 40% are banned serde roundtrip tests. Coverage density low for these types.

crates/engine_scene/tests/suite/sort_pro.summary: Solid DFS sort propagation: root reset, two-root ordering, parent-child DFS, no sibling interleaving, grandchildren, LocalSortOrder, zero-default, entity filtering.

findings.detail: Only 3 tests, all happy-path. No multiple spawn, parent despawn, complex bundles, double-spawn edge cases
findings.suggestion: Add tests for multiple spawn_child, spawn on despawned parent, verify return value

crates/engine_scene/tests/suite/spawn_ch.summary: Minimal happy-path tests for SpawnChildExt. Only 3 tests covering most basic scenarios.

crates/engine_scene/tests/suite/transfor.summary: Top-tier: comprehensive affine composition, identity, translation, scale, 3-level hierarchy, sibling independence, multiple roots, chained ordering, update detection, no-change optimization.

crates/engine_scene/tests/suite/visibili.summary: Excellent visibility propagation: full AND-logic matrix, default-visible, parent-child combos, 3-level hierarchy, sibling independence, chained ordering, update-on-change, inheritance.

crates/engine_ui/tests/suite/interaction.summary: 12 tests covering hover, press, click, focus, visibility, anchor offset, overlapping nodes, and disabled state. Thorough edge-case coverage.

crates/engine_ui/tests/suite/layout_anch.summary: 7 tests (2 proptest) for anchor_offset: individual anchors, any-size invariants, all-9-anchors, all-offsets-distinct. Pure function tests.

crates/engine_ui/tests/suite/layout_flex.summary: 8 tests (1 proptest) for compute_flex_offsets: row/column, gaps, margins, single child, empty children, margin accumulation. Proptest checks monotonic increasing x-offsets.

findings.detail: No custom assertion messages in any of 7 tests
findings.suggestion: Add descriptive messages identifying which child and layout scenario failed

crates/engine_ui/tests/suite/layout_syst.summary: 7 ECS-integration tests verifying ui_layout_system. Missing empty-children and zero-size edge cases. No diagnostic messages.

findings.detail: Module declaration file, not a test file. Contains only mod statements.

findings.detail: No custom assertion messages in any of 8 tests

crates/engine_ui/tests/suite/render.rs.summary: 8 tests for ui_render_system using SpyRenderer: background drawn/absent, anchor positions, size match, color match, invisible suppression, multi-node rendering.

crates/engine_ui/tests/suite/text_render.summary: 5 tests for text_render_system: single text draws, invisible suppression, empty world, rotation matrix, max-width wrapping. Some assertions use weak !is_empty() checks.

findings.detail: Only 1 test covering RON serialization roundtrip. No tests for Default impl, theme application, partial overrides, or color accessors
findings.suggestion: Add tests for default theme values, custom theme propagation, font_size effects, partial theme configs

crates/engine_ui/tests/suite/theme.rs.summary: Single RON roundtrip test for UiTheme. Minimal coverage -- no behavioral tests for theme application in rendering systems.

crates/engine_ui/tests/suite/unified_ren.summary: 11 tests for unified_render_system: shape+text interleaving, SortOrder, ColorMesh, visibility culling, CachedMesh path, tessellation fallback, sprite ordering, DrawQueue, fill-before-stroke, camera culling, blend-mode dedup.

findings.detail: No custom assertion messages in any of 8 tests
findings.suggestion: Add messages like assert_eq!(rects[0].color, theme.hovered_color, 'hovered button should use theme hovered_color')

crates/engine_ui/tests/suite/widget_butt.summary: 8 tests for button_render_system: all four interaction state colors, invisible suppression, center anchor offset, position+size correctness.

findings.detail: Only 3 RON roundtrip serialization tests (UiNode, FlexLayout, Text). Zero behavioral tests for core UiNode type

crates/engine_ui/tests/suite/widget_prog.summary: 7 tests for progress_bar_render_system: zero/half/full/overfill fill widths, center anchor offset, invisible suppression. Comprehensive fill-state coverage.
